C

changeGreenActivity(GreenActivity, GreenActivity) - Method in class model.VillageModelManager
Changes a GreenActivity from GreenActivities
changeGreenGoal(GreenGoal, GreenGoal) - Method in class model.VillageModelManager
Changes a GreenGoal from goals
changeTrade(TradeOffer, TradeOffer) - Method in class model.VillageModelManager
Replaces an existing trade offer with an updated one Validates that neither the old nor the new trade is null then updates the trade in the village and saves the changes
changeVillager(Villager, Villager) - Method in class model.Village
 
changeVillager(Villager, Villager) - Method in class model.VillageModelManager
Changes a villager from the Village
checkPoints(int) - Method in class model.Villager
checks if the Villager has more personal points than the parameter requiredpoints --> for trade offers
checkReset() - Method in class model.Village
checks if today is the day of the reset if it is --> it calls resetNow() and resets the villagers --> also returns -1 if it isn't --> checks how many days are left until reset and returns the value
cloverTest - Class in model
cloverTest class for adding some default values to the village, primarily for testing and also writing to file (.bin)
cloverTest() - Constructor for class model.cloverTest
 
completeGreenActivity(ActionEvent) - Method in class view.Controller
 
completeGreenGoal(ActionEvent) - Method in class view.Controller
 
completeSharedTask() - Method in class view.Controller
 
Controller - Class in view
 
Controller() - Constructor for class view.Controller
 
copy() - Method in class model.Date
creates and returns an identical Date object
copy() - Method in class model.GreenActivity
 
copy() - Method in class model.GreenGoal
 
copy() - Method in class model.SharedTask
 
copy() - Method in class model.TradeOffer
copy() method creates and returns an identical TradeOffer object
copy() - Method in class model.Villager
creates and returns an identical Villager object
copytradeswithoutpos() - Method in class model.Village
copies trades without their associated possiblebuyers
copywithoutpos() - Method in class model.TradeOffer
copywithoutpos() method creates and returns an identical Date object only without the ArrayList of possiblebuyers --> used for JSON later
